info: This value represents a single `ImplementationDefined` value.
If not all `ImplementationDefined` values are permitted, then the implemented value must be one of the values described in the constraints property.

examples.meaning: An ImplementationDefined value with no constraints.
An ImplementationDefined value with two constraints.

info: This property highlights implementation constraints that apply.
When set to None no constraints apply.

title: ImplementationDefined
